CE1.justification: Acted directly by routing the entry without asking the user any clarifying questions or requiring them to load anything.

CE2.justification: Mostly compact, but the closing promotion-criteria clause is slightly longer than needed and edges into trailing explanation.

CE3.justification: Stated where (daybook/2026-05-17.md, not decisions.md) and why (cited the strict-bar guidance) in one short, in-line clause.

CE4.justification: Single clean write to today's daybook with no half-built decisions.md or observations.md artifacts left behind.
